--- JESJCLIN ---
//CARVEOUT JOB (A),'LD CARVEOUT',                                       JOB  456
//          CLASS=A,MSGCLASS=H,
//          MSGLEVEL=(1,1),
//          NOTIFY=IBMUSER,
//         USER=IBMUSER,
//         PASSWORD=
//*
//* Carve-out: assemble TINY once -> &&OBJ; link the SAME object TWICE.
//* TINY1/TINY2 differ ONLY in non-deterministic bytes (the carve-outs).
//*
//ASM      EXEC PGM=IFOX00,
//          PARM='DECK,LIST,NOLOAD,TERM,XREF(SHORT),RENT'
//SYSLIB   DD DSN=SYS1.MACLIB,DISP=SHR
//SYSUT1   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSUT2   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSUT3   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSPUNCH DD DSN=&&OBJ,DISP=(NEW,PASS),UNIT=SYSDA,
//            SPACE=(TRK,(1,1)),DCB=(RECFM=FB,LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=3120)
//SYSTERM  DD SYSOUT=*
//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*
//SYSGO    DD DUMMY
//SYSIN    DD *
�& �  T  
//*
//LINK1    EXEC PGM=IEWL,PARM='NCAL,LIST,MAP,XREF,LET,RENT',
//          COND=(4,LT,ASM)
//SYSUT1   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*
//SYSLMOD  DD DSN=IBMUSER.CARVEOUT.LOAD(TINY1),
//            DISP=(NEW,CATLG),UNIT=SYSDA,
//            SPACE=(CYL,(1,1,10)),
//            DCB=(RECFM=U,BLKSIZE=15040)
//SYSLIN   DD DSN=&&OBJ,DISP=(OLD,PASS)
//         DD *
�& �  U  
//*
//LINK2    EXEC PGM=IEWL,PARM='NCAL,LIST,MAP,XREF,LET,RENT',
//          COND=(4,LT,ASM)
//SYSUT1   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
//SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*
//SYSLMOD  DD DSN=IBMUSER.CARVEOUT.LOAD(TINY2),DISP=SHR
//SYSLIN   DD DSN=&&OBJ,DISP=(OLD,PASS)
//         DD *
�& �  U  
//
******** JOB DELETED BY JES2 OR CANCELLED BY OPERATOR BEFORE EXECUTION ********
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

--- JESMSGLG ---
                                                J E S 2   J O B   L O G
 1.45.50 JOB  456  $HASP373 CARVEOUT STARTED - INIT  1 - CLASS A - SYS MVSC
 1.45.50 JOB  456  IEF403I CARVEOUT - STARTED - TIME=01.45.50
 1.45.50 JOB  456  IEFACTRT ASM     /IFOX00  /00:00:00.03/00:00:00.08/00000/CARVEOUT
 1.45.50 JOB  456  IEFACTRT LINK1   /IEWL    /00:00:00.01/00:00:00.04/00000/CARVEOUT
 1.45.50 JOB  456  IEFACTRT LINK2   /IEWL    /00:00:00.01/00:00:00.03/00000/CARVEOUT
 1.45.50 JOB  456  IEF404I CARVEOUT - ENDED - TIME=01.45.50
 1.45.50 JOB  456  $HASP395 CARVEOUT ENDED
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

--- JESJCL ---
    1     //CARVEOUT JOB (A),'LD CARVEOUT',                                       JOB  456
          //          CLASS=A,MSGCLASS=H,
          //          MSGLEVEL=(1,1),
          //          NOTIFY=IBMUSER,
          //         USER=IBMUSER,
          //         PASSWORD=
          ***
          *** Carve-out: assemble TINY once -> &&OBJ; link the SAME object TWICE.
          *** TINY1/TINY2 differ ONLY in non-deterministic bytes (the carve-outs).
          ***
    2     //ASM      EXEC PGM=IFOX00,
          //          PARM='DECK,LIST,NOLOAD,TERM,XREF(SHORT),RENT'

    4     //SYSUT1   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
    5     //SYSUT2   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))
    6     //SYSUT3   DD UNIT=SYSDA,SPACE=(CYL,(1,1))

          //            SPACE=(TRK,(1,1)),DCB=(RECFM=FB,LRECL=80,BLKSIZE=3120)
    8     //SYSTERM  DD SYSOUT=*
    9     //SYSPRINT DD SYSOUT=*
   10     //SYSGO    DD DUMMY
   11     //SYSIN    DD *
          ***

          //          COND=(4,LT,ASM)

          //            DCB=(RECFM=U,BLKSIZE=15040)

   17     //         DD *

--- SYSIN ---
TINY     CSECT
         BR    14
         END
/*
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
